title: Oozing│滲漿
description: The Slime's attacks will apply a permanent Oozing effect to the target.│史萊姆的攻擊會對目標施加滲漿效果。
body:
# Function│功能
- The Slime's attacks will additionally apply the Oozing effect to the target, which lasts for 8 minutes.│史萊姆的攻擊會對攻擊目標額外施加滲漿效果，持續8分鐘。

The datapack achieves this effect via a custom enchantment called "oozing", so if you see an enchanted book with the "frozen_armor" enchantment in your Creative Inventory, please ignore it.│該資料包透過名為"oozing"的自訂附魔來實現此效果，因此如果您在創造模式物品欄中看到帶有"frozen_armor"附魔的附魔書，請忽略它。
